nodes.context: Criminal gangs operating in riverine areas of Sindh and Punjab, Pakistan, involved in kidnapping, extortion, dacoity, murder, and other illegal activities.
nodes.time_period: 1950–1960 (presumed to have originated from the local feudalism)

nodes.context: One of the principal gangs within the Katcha dacoits.
